Hustle Challenge
Combat Hustle Amulet

When an enemy unit receives a shield or a damage-reducing effect, 3 random enemy units have 5 random shields or damage-reducing effects removed from them. The amulet's owner and 3 random allied units also receive shields that block 5 attacks each and exist up to 4 sec. Stacks up to 1 times. The ability triggers only once per 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Combat Hustle

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
